root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't want you to be in pain. Shepherd wants you to be happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, it's time Shepherd was honest with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to go with you.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to go with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can Shepherd do that?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful.
